name: Avgolemono (Greek Egg & Lemon Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the chicken stock to a boil in a stockpot.
2. Add the rice and reduce heat.
3. Simmer until the rice is tender (about 20 minutes).
4. Beat the egg yolk and lemon juice together in a separate bowl.
5. Stir in 1/2 cup of the hot stock into the egg mixture.
6. Whisk the egg mixture back into the stockpot.
7. Reheat gently, ensuring it does not boil.
8. Serve.
